concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains 'Figure 9' on page 15, which is a meaningful map displaying the distribution of Dwarf milfoil. However, this image and its corresponding figure caption are entirely missing from the HTML output. The HTML output skips directly from the Figure 8 image and caption to the Figure 10 image and caption.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Figure 9. Dwarf milfoil (Myriophyllum tenellum) was found at 28 sample sites in 2021
concerns.output_quote: The HTML output skips from <figcaption>**Figure 8.** Purple Bladderwort (*Utricularia purpurea*) was found at 8 sample sites in 2021</figcaption> directly to <figcaption>Figure 10. Filamentous algae (*Spirogyra spp.*) was found at 57 sample sites in 2021</figcaption>, with no image or caption for Figure 9 in between.
concerns.location: Source Page 15 / HTML output between Figure 8 and Figure 10

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 2 table(s) with 3+ rows have no <th> header cells
concerns.analysis: data_in_th=0, datarow_as_header=0, no_th_tables=2. Tables use <th> for data values, have a data row mismarked as a header row, or lack <th> elements entirely. Screen readers rely on <th> to announce column/row context.

concerns.description: Incomplete image alt text: 15 image(s) with inadequate descriptions (13 truncated mid-sentence, 2 generic placeholder(s)) — e.g. p6: "...rounded by land with trees, roads, and residential"; p7: "...Abundance, displaying a grid of data points across"; p9: "...red circles indicating the distribution of aquatic"
concerns.analysis: incomplete_alt_text=15 (truncated=13, placeholder=2, empty=0). Per WCAG 2.1 AA, meaningful images must have descriptive alternative text for screen-reader accessibility.

concerns.description: Table column count mismatch: p8(source:3cols,output:7cols), p8(source:3cols,output:7cols)
concerns.analysis: Matched tables have different column counts. Pages: p8(source:3cols,output:7cols), p8(source:3cols,output:7cols)

concerns.description: Displaced hyperlinks: 1 link(s) extracted as standalone elements instead of inline text
concerns.analysis: standalone_links=1, examples=['https://auth1.dpr.ncparks.gov/flora/species_account.php?id=4']. Links should be inline within paragraphs, not separate blocks.
